summary: The daemon persistence utility now writes typed trajectory, brain, and explicit run-brain artifact index records with typed load and cleanup coverage. A second bridge process can inspect the durable runtime state and decode the run-brain artifact index. Live GUI replay/restart proof remains required before ARP-P0-001/002 can close as product proof.

rowStatus.remainingProof: Live GUI replay/reconnect without duplicate side effects.
Live Agent Studio display/replay of plan, task checklist, walkthrough, scratch refs, artifact refs, and replay cursor.

tests.command: cargo run -q -p ioi-node --features local-mode --bin ioi-runtime-bridge -- start_thread/inspect_thread disposable proof
